backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the Gopal Book Agency backend, implementing book catalog management, order processing, and user profile storage with role-based access control (admin/user permissions).
backend/migration.mo: Simple migration module that passes the old actor state (including access control) directly to the new actor without transformation.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting that the admin check flow was updated in Header, useQueries, and AdminPanelPage so admin status reflects immediately after Internet Identity login without a page refresh.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of all frontend source files, describing their purpose and key implementation details for the bookstore app.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS file defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Gopal Book Agency frontend, mounting the React app into a root div and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with all application routes (catalog, book detail, cart, checkout, orders, admin), wraps the app in CartProvider and ThemeProvider, and handles profile setup modal display.
frontend/src/components/admin/BookFormMo: Admin dialog modal for creating or editing a book, with form validation, BigInt price handling, and mutations for add/update book operations.
frontend/src/components/admin/BooksManag: Admin tab component for managing books, displaying a table with edit/delete actions and a modal for adding or editing books.
frontend/src/components/admin/OrdersMana: Admin tab component that displays all orders in a searchable, sortable table with order details and status badges.
frontend/src/components/auth/AccessDenie: Full-page screen shown when a non-admin user attempts to access a restricted page, with a button to return to the catalog.
frontend/src/components/auth/ProfileSetu: Modal dialog that prompts newly authenticated users to enter their name and contact info to complete profile setup.
frontend/src/components/BookCard.tsx: Reusable card component displaying a book's cover image, discount badge, category, title, author, and formatted price with hover animations and out-of-stock overlay.
frontend/src/components/layout/Footer.ts: Site footer with branding, quick navigation links, an about blurb, and a caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/components/layout/Header.ts: Sticky site header with logo, navigation links (including admin), cart badge, user profile display, and Internet Identity login/logout.
frontend/src/components/layout/Layout.ts: Root layout wrapper that composes the Header, Footer, and a router Outlet for page content.
frontend/src/context/CartContext.tsx: React context providing cart state (items, totals) with add/remove/update/clear actions, persisted to sessionStorage with BigInt serialization.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, supporting both anonymous and authenticated (Internet Identity) usage, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing login/logout state via AuthClient and exposing identity, login status, and helper booleans to child components.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks for the app, including queries and mutations for user profiles, books, admin checks, and orders, each delegating to the backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, sets up Tailwind CSS layers, and defines CSS custom properties for a warm bookshop color palette in both light and dark modes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider into the DOM root.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPanelPage.tsx: Admin panel page that checks authentication and admin status before rendering tabbed management interfaces for books and orders, showing a loading spinner or access-denied screen as appropriate.
frontend/src/pages/BookDetailPage.tsx: Book detail page that fetches and displays a single book's cover, metadata, pricing, and discount, with an add-to-cart button and loading/error states.
frontend/src/pages/CartPage.tsx: Shopping cart page that shows cart items with quantity controls and a total, prompting unauthenticated users to log in and displaying an empty-state message when the cart has no items.
frontend/src/pages/CatalogPage.tsx: Displays a paginated book catalog with a hero banner, search input, and category filter dropdown, fetching books via `useGetAllBooks` and rendering them in a responsive grid with skeleton loading states.
frontend/src/pages/CheckoutPage.tsx: Handles the checkout flow by collecting buyer name and contact, validating inputs, placing an order via `usePlaceOrder`, and storing confirmation data in sessionStorage before navigating to the confirmation page; shows login prompt if unauthenticated.
frontend/src/pages/OrderConfirmationPage: Reads order confirmation data from sessionStorage and displays a success screen with buyer info, ordered items, and total; redirects to home if no confirmation data is found.
frontend/src/pages/OrderHistoryPage.tsx: Shows a logged-in user's past orders sorted by date, with status badges and skeleton loading; prompts unauthenticated users to log in via Internet Identity.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions for reading URL query parameters from both standard and hash-based routes, persisting them to sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the URL hash without a page reload.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Configures Tailwind CSS with dark mode, custom OKLCH-based color tokens, serif/sans font families, extended shadows and border radii, accordion keyframe animations, and the typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the current state of the 'Gopal Book Agency' bookstore app project, including architectural notes, existing features, known issues, and pending feature requests related to Internet Identity authentication and admin access bootstrapping.
